title: rm --help output in tool result
description: The help text output of the rm command returned as an MCP tool result. Help text should not trigger shell obfuscation detection.

content.text:
Usage: rm [OPTION]... [FILE]...
Remove (unlink) the FILE(s).

  -f, --force           ignore nonexistent files and arguments
  -r, -R, --recursive   remove directories and their contents recursively
  --help     display this help and exit
